summary: Completed testing of Italian coaching academy platform. Backend APIs working 100% but critical frontend-backend connectivity issue found due to mismatched URLs.

critical_bugs.issue: Frontend .env has wrong backend URL - using https://tactical-harmony.preview.emergentagent.com instead of https://3030cbf5-4104-489c-aa99-8317c58e9b2e.preview.emergentagent.com
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all authentication, registration, and API calls from frontend

critical_bugs.issue: Admin login and student registration fail due to backend URL mismatch
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot log in or register, blocking all functionality

integration_issues.issue: Login form submits but fails to authenticate due to wrong backend URL
Registration form submits but fails to create account due to wrong backend URL

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with Italian content
Backend APIs all working (100% success rate - 31/31 tests passed)
Payment info API returns correct 49 EUR price and PayPal email
Admin credentials validation works on backend
Student registration API works on backend
Public modules API working with free lesson info
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Update frontend/.env file to change REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from https://tactical-harmony.preview.emergentagent.com to https://3030cbf5-4104-489c-aa99-8317c58e9b2e.preview.emergentagent.com to match the backend URL. This is blocking all frontend-backend communication.
